3264190.name: Eden: Salvation Demo
3264190.description:
Welcome to the world of Eden. In this world animal hybrids are the last living species. Play as different animals and level up by defeating enemies and increasing your general level for more stats. The mystery of why this is all happening is still at large, but for now fight your way through endless hordes and explore your surroundings. 

Abominations exist in this land, hybrids of the unspeakable and they are massive. Where could they be? That is for you to go to find them.

Explore the areas to find hidden lore, fight different hybrids, and learn about the characters you play as. Activate skills and talents which are earned by getting kills and experience!

This being a demo means there is less content but still brings the experience that the main game will have. Art, UI, and some Gameplay will be very different in the full experience when chapter 1 releases. The demo has about 30 minutes to an hour of content. It can take 1 hour or more to fully complete the demo.

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
